name: Susie Lee
subject: it’s getting late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
are you still up?

| | Hey there, it’s Susie Lee. I know it’s getting late but I wanted to get one more message out to you before our midnight fundraising deadline tonight. We are just a few hours shy of our May deadline, and unfortunately, **we’re still a couple of dollars short of our goal. I’m hoping by reaching out to you personally one last time you’ll chip in $10 or $20 to help me close the gap._Can I count on you?_** Here’s your personal link to donate right now: [**_http://susieleeforcongress.com/donate_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30069503/288408311/-2116988518?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210531_FR_EOM6_A0_NA_U1_X1_M3&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y3YjgyNC05NGMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9wq1r8CYBQKUiVoZ5qg2QlnxMc_jPCrl62-c8YnYwo=) This has been a busy month here in NV-03 — I’m working hard to make sure Nevadans are getting the relief they need, and their COVID vaccinations. With support from President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris, **Congress has delivered real help to Americans in need right now** , and I’m proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish this year. But I couldn’t have done it without you. Our race in November was really close, and I’m certain we wouldn’t have pulled it off without every single one of you. **Tonight I’m asking for your support again. Please chip in whatever you can tonight — _before the deadline_ — to help me close out May on a strong note.** **Here’s your personal link to donate:** [**_http://susieleeforcongress.com/donate_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30069504/288408312/-2116988518?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210531_FR_EOM6_A0_NA_U1_X1_M3&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y3YjgyNC05NGMyLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N9wq1r8CYBQKUiVoZ5qg2QlnxMc_jPCrl62-c8YnYwo=) Thanks for being part of my team. Good night, Susie Sent from my iPhone

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: The Real Difference
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.186550.aspx)
Dear Peter,
Under the far-left Biden administration, Americans are seeing their hard-earned money fly out of their pockets. At a time when families and businesses are struggling to recover from the pandemic, Biden's extreme policies are crushing taxpayers and punishing future generations with outrageous record-high debt.
I want you to know that I refuse to accept this situation. Instead, I am fighting every day to stop Biden and his far-left allies in Congress from causing further economic devastation for you and your loved ones. While working to hold this administration accountable, I am also promoting policies designed specifically to help restore our nation's prosperity and make every family stronger.
By staying in this fight together, we can guarantee that brighter days for America are coming.
Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.186550.aspx)
_P.S. _You can like our [Facebook ](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.186550.aspx)page [](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.186550.aspx) , follow us on [Twitter](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.186550.aspx) [](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.186550.aspx) , or contribute to my campaign at [www.mikekellyforcongress.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.186550.aspx). Your contributions are greatly appreciated!
**[www.mikekellyforcongress.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.186550.aspx)**

The bottom line is that we’re still $3,321 short of where we need to be in order to keep pace with the Democrats and stay on track to win the Majority. But the good news is that we’ve been authorized to extend our internal deadline until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT in order to give TOP CONSERVATIVES extra time to close the gap. | | If we fail to reach this Deadline Goal, anything could happen, Peter. We haven’t seen the Democrats’ latest numbers yet, but we know Nancy Pelosi has been absolutely BEGGING her donors for days. And they always step up and give. That’s why we’re pleading with you to take advantage of this extended deadline. We’re only $3,321 away from meeting our goal, and your donation of $35 or more could put us over the top! | Thank you for whatever you can do. Republican Deadline Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Trump Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Breaking: Trump claiming he'll be "reinstated by August"
body:
According to New York Times reporter Maggie Haberman, "Trump has been telling a number of people he's in contact with that he expects he will get reinstated by August" (source)
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/telltrumpnoyourenotbeingreinstatedaspresidentyou1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | | Hi Friend,
### [Tell Trump: "No, you're not getting 'reinstated as president,' jackass"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9afd8b4-1034-42cb-ba5c-0c360d5d5840/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
According to [New York Times reporter Maggie Haberman](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffc59447-c379-40e8-add3-5c3e6c105644/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), "Trump has been telling a number of people he's in contact with that he expects he will get reinstated by August" ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T290cd018-857d-43be-be56-28e317cc7bbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) He apparently believes this, because he thinks the election will be overturned. And he believes that, because he is a world-class jackass. [**Send Trump a message:** **“No, you’re not being ‘reinstated as president’, you jackass”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbdcd8470-3111-4d0f-aaef-bd6faa924265/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d9f9063-48ed-4884-8021-da3c74f932d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Send Trump a message:** **“No, you’re not being ‘reinstated as president’, you jackass”**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T015a065d-fa69-427a-84b8-9a3f2e45024b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: NEW video: America First is the way forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tIk7FfIZWijjOQ25S4uPj1SWxEXqzzOzKOADHWporWGVWZ7VVZf37rV5Gl8Ks-bD-ADbgnOtcQPu_ZUkOFqDaG_oFSiRD2_8rcmlErk_uDVMlHaPfjY45jDn1EEhVif2rm3bnYPK8Vz5qdVzOJ0Q6ljcfhFBsxHkH6Vnif_7DTnnCaTmevaSiAjODvKf4f8z&c=7PpsJhpIeNnTCAG2UeyW9yEocDhDjD3NzVlV9DHNo6LS87b1ZxmyBg==&ch=_Ni3ybfcoupj0HGU8ttd9KQPpNWfLw0ECQ3O94Tdsd2ou0PDntGicw==&jrc=1)

| Friends -
Welcome to the Greatest Political Show on Earth.
For the past few weeks, I have been touring the country with Marjorie Taylor Greene, and what we have seen is incredible. The energy for America First has never been stronger, and I will fight off every big tech oligarch, every far-left journalist, and deep state actor that stands in our way.
[Check out this video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tIk7FfIZWijjOQ25S4uPj1SWxEXqzzOzKOADHWporWGVWZ7VVZf37rV5Gl8Ks-bD-ADbgnOtcQPu_ZUkOFqDaG_oFSiRD2_8rcmlErk_uDVMlHaPfjY45jDn1EEhVif2rm3bnYPK8Vz5qdVzOJ0Q6ljcfhFBsxHkH6Vnif_7DTnnCaTmevaSiAjODvKf4f8z&c=7PpsJhpIeNnTCAG2UeyW9yEocDhDjD3NzVlV9DHNo6LS87b1ZxmyBg==&ch=_Ni3ybfcoupj0HGU8ttd9KQPpNWfLw0ECQ3O94Tdsd2ou0PDntGicw==&jrc=1) from our last few stops on the America First Rally Tour:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tIk7FfIZWijjOQ25S4uPj1SWxEXqzzOzKOADHWporWGVWZ7VVZf37rV5Gl8Ks-bD-ADbgnOtcQPu_ZUkOFqDaG_oFSiRD2_8rcmlErk_uDVMlHaPfjY45jDn1EEhVif2rm3bnYPK8Vz5qdVzOJ0Q6ljcfhFBsxHkH6Vnif_7DTnnCaTmevaSiAjODvKf4f8z&c=7PpsJhpIeNnTCAG2UeyW9yEocDhDjD3NzVlV9DHNo6LS87b1ZxmyBg==&ch=_Ni3ybfcoupj0HGU8ttd9KQPpNWfLw0ECQ3O94Tdsd2ou0PDntGicw==&jrc=1)
---
| This America First Movement cannot be stopped. For too long, we have been the Silent Majority, forgotten by the political elite and the media. We have become the AMERICA FIRST MAJORITY, and we will no longer stand for weak RINOs and the Establishment trying to sell us out.
This is Donald Trump's party, and I am a Donald Trump Republican.
I have been canceled in most circles for daring to stand in the way of the Establishment, which is why I'm going to need your immediate support. Our monthly fundraising deadline is approaching, [so I hope you sill chip in](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tIk7FfIZWijjOQ25S4uPj1SWxEXqzzOzKOADHWporWGVWZ7VVZf37rV5Gl8Ks-bD-ADbgnOtcQPu_ZUkOFqDaG_oFSiRD2_8rcmlErk_uDVMlHaPfjY45jDn1EEhVif2rm3bnYPK8Vz5qdVzOJ0Q6ljcfhFBsxHkH6Vnif_7DTnnCaTmevaSiAjODvKf4f8z&c=7PpsJhpIeNnTCAG2UeyW9yEocDhDjD3NzVlV9DHNo6LS87b1ZxmyBg==&ch=_Ni3ybfcoupj0HGU8ttd9KQPpNWfLw0ECQ3O94Tdsd2ou0PDntGicw==&jrc=1)[ $10,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tIk7FfIZWijjOQ25S4uPj1SWxEXqzzOzKOADHWporWGVWZ7VVZf37rV5Gl8Ks-bDHpktOzDduUW9GFVZHxQxYmRtawFwVutKLF1QdONH9chlKh79M5srdozknSI9NNcN_ine8Y6aclf-9k5bbhVI9yJWLCPV98iRMpDH3TlrkhgClqkVTq3LPCsPnBDVmXjS3uzpiyw4q5Q=&c=7PpsJhpIeNnTCAG2UeyW9yEocDhDjD3NzVlV9DHNo6LS87b1ZxmyBg==&ch=_Ni3ybfcoupj0HGU8ttd9KQPpNWfLw0ECQ3O94Tdsd2ou0PDntGicw==&jrc=1)[ $25,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tIk7FfIZWijjOQ25S4uPj1SWxEXqzzOzKOADHWporWGVWZ7VVZf37rV5Gl8Ks-bDm_T7xTwj65QPkK02VYt3rosFHIeADv_6yA2C7xkTbC5ZCxqR36JPmR8U8Hv6BXqA19do8a_7xCqr1QCo5O6-0rZQFvw6oG0LIGC8hZKDWN3VtTkPA6W3SvJfpyOEgjO9VTUCPjTI5_I=&c=7PpsJhpIeNnTCAG2UeyW9yEocDhDjD3NzVlV9DHNo6LS87b1ZxmyBg==&ch=_Ni3ybfcoupj0HGU8ttd9KQPpNWfLw0ECQ3O94Tdsd2ou0PDntGicw==&jrc=1)[ or even $100](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tIk7FfIZWijjOQ25S4uPj1SWxEXqzzOzKOADHWporWGVWZ7VVZf37rV5Gl8Ks-bDm-D0ByiiTl3bXRIA46SM_Lmlr65gi2OgW5czjKc8xAOp3tSWr4My0wlQoqxzgFfdaK9eq0LZNNYI-Vjvu20Z1lne-sVG3TUDI7XoF5Q-4qzRkUHtc8ST9BKgXtHI-bpKum0RlxRpNo9vfeaPLRWceQ==&c=7PpsJhpIeNnTCAG2UeyW9yEocDhDjD3NzVlV9DHNo6LS87b1ZxmyBg==&ch=_Ni3ybfcoupj0HGU8ttd9KQPpNWfLw0ECQ3O94Tdsd2ou0PDntGicw==&jrc=1) [to help my team stay in the fight.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tIk7FfIZWijjOQ25S4uPj1SWxEXqzzOzKOADHWporWGVWZ7VVZf37rV5Gl8Ks-bD-ADbgnOtcQPu_ZUkOFqDaG_oFSiRD2_8rcmlErk_uDVMlHaPfjY45jDn1EEhVif2rm3bnYPK8Vz5qdVzOJ0Q6ljcfhFBsxHkH6Vnif_7DTnnCaTmevaSiAjODvKf4f8z&c=7PpsJhpIeNnTCAG2UeyW9yEocDhDjD3NzVlV9DHNo6LS87b1ZxmyBg==&ch=_Ni3ybfcoupj0HGU8ttd9KQPpNWfLw0ECQ3O94Tdsd2ou0PDntGicw==&jrc=1)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of May 31st: Research your local government & more…
body:
| |
---
Yesterday was Memorial Day, the day we stop to honor and remember the Americans who gave their lives to protect and defend our Constitution, our country, and our way of life. Please remember to pray for those who have fallen and for their families. Make sure to tell your children and grandchildren what Memorial Day means and about the heroes in our nation’s history; keep the memories alive, and help instill a love of country in America’s future generation.

**Action items for this week include:**
* Discussing certain issues with your Members of Congress (in person or calling their offices)
* Researching your local government entities so you are ready to act
* Sign-up forms in case you haven’t sign up yet for various activities

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Issues to Discuss with Your Senators and Representative – in person or over the phone**
**In person:** Members are home this week, and sometimes, particularly around holidays like Memorial Day, they attend community events. If you find yourself at an event with any of your Members, please discuss the following list of issues with them.

**Phone:** If you will not be at any events with your Members, please call your Senators and your Representative and just read through this list over the phone.
* No new Iran Deal! Iran uses American taxpayer money to attack Israel, and would only use any concessions in a new deal to further their ability to make war against Israel and the U.S. **_Oppose any new version of the Iran Deal!_**
* Biden’s tax plans are insane. He wants to jack up corporate tax rates, and like usual, this is a bad idea for the economy and jobs. But it’s especially bad while America attempts to recover from the government-imposed Covid lockdowns, and while people are getting paid more to sit at home than go to work. **_Oppose Biden’s tax plans!_**
* The infrastructure bill is a backdoor to the Green New Deal. The Democrats know the GND is unpopular, so like they do, they are hiding it in another bill. This will make America even more dependent on China and the Middle East. It’s also interesting that Biden killed the Keystone Pipeline (an American pipeline), but approved a Putin pipeline. Where are all the Russia conspirators now? **_Oppose the infrastructure bill!_**

|
---
On Memorial Day, we remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in defense of our great nation.

Memorial Day weekend is not a long-weekend for relaxation and revelry, it is a time to remember and mourn those that paid the highest price to protect and preserve the liberty we hold dear.

Without them, there would be no American holidays, there would be no freedom, and there would be no America.

They are the reason we are here, living in the land of the free. And on Memorial Day, we remember them, their service and their sacrifice.

We must never forget that we are the land of the free **because** of the brave.
|
---
**Get Your Research on Local Government Done This Week**
July is National Attend a School Board Meeting Month. August is National Attend a City Government Meeting Month. This week is the time to get all your research done about your local government, so that in July and August (and any other time that arises), you are ready to act.

Please note that the exact names of the government entities will vary from place to place, i.e. it might be called “county council,” or “county commission,” etc. That’s part of your research – what are your local government entities even called? Compile your research in a spreadsheet or document on your computer, or on paper, whichever you prefer. Just make sure it’s easy to access when you need it.

**Basic List of Local Government Entities to Research**
* School Board (even if you don’t have kids in the local school district, you pay taxes to support it and have a say)
* City Council
* County Council
* Library Board
* Board of Elections

**Basic Questions to Research**
* Who are the members?
* How many members are there?
* What is their contact information?
* Are they appointed or elected? If appointed, who appoints them and when? If elected, when is their next election?
* Do they represent districts? If so, what are the districts and is there a map you can access?
* When do they meet?
* Can you attend a meeting in person or is it online?
* Where do they meet if it’s in person? If it’s online, how can you register for the online meeting? Do you need to RSVP ahead of time?
* Can you comment during a meeting? If so, what are the rules about commenting? How much time will you have? Do you have to sign up ahead of time?
* Right now, do they require masks to attend the meetings?
* What’s the process for submitting legislation/ordinances/rules to them?
* _Anything else you find that you think would be important to know ahead of time!_

|
---
“Critical race theory has managed to sneak its way into the U.S. federal government, our nation’s schools and corporate training programs. Americans are beginning to realize the insidious nature of this Marxist ideology that views racism as the primary force at work in our society....”

**[Read the full break down](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTUyLTRkN2M0MDI5NmQwNTQ3MTc4Y2E1NWI1MGMxZTRlZTBj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjEvbWF5LzI1L2NyaXRpY2FsLXJhY2UtdGhlb3J5LWNhbi1iZS1zdG9wcGVkLWhlcmVzLWhvdy8_bWlkPTQzODU4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=tgN2w7XXoNdDji381WKSAQ) from Jenny Beth Martin on why and how we can stop Critical Race Theory.**[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTUyLTRkN2M0MDI5NmQwNTQ3MTc4Y2E1NWI1MGMxZTRlZTBj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9tLndhc2hpbmd0b250aW1lcy5jb20vbmV3cy8yMDIxL21heS8yNS9jcml0aWNhbC1yYWNlLXRoZW9yeS1jYW4tYmUtc3RvcHBlZC1oZXJlcy1ob3cvP21pZD00Mzg1OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=kGMEgaS4Bu82HEYyWP4Nog)
|
---
**Sign up for the Eternal Vigilance Project**
If you haven’t yet signed up for the Eternal Vigilance Project, please sign up this week! There are two levels available. Keeper of the Republic of has fewer commitments than Champion of the Republic, so pick the level that matches your availability, and while even Keeper might be a challenge, I encourage you to try to meet that challenge. Sign up at the links below.
[KEEPER OF THE REPUBLIC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTUyLTRkN2M0MDI5NmQwNTQ3MTc4Y2E1NWI1MGMxZTRlZTBj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMva2VlcGVyLW9mLXRoZS1yZXB1YmxpYy8_bWlkPTQzODU4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=T3R6g22U2UCtsJhiFOXNmA)
[CHAMPION OF THE REPUBLIC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTUyLTRkN2M0MDI5NmQwNTQ3MTc4Y2E1NWI1MGMxZTRlZTBj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvY2hhbXBpb24tb2YtdGhlLXJlcHVibGljLz9taWQ9NDM4NTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=X-fBUXB7O0nk88sQU7tbrQ)

|
---
GREAT NEWS: After we filed an amicus curiae brief in support of the petitioner, a judge in Fulton County, Georgia granted the motion to unseal in the case Favorito v. Cooney.

[In the words](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTUyLTRkN2M0MDI5NmQwNTQ3MTc4Y2E1NWI1MGMxZTRlZTBj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZS9mdWx0b24tY291bnR5LWp1ZGdlLWdyYW50cy1tb3Rpb24tdG8tdW5zZWFsLWluLWZhdm9yaXRvLXZzLWNvb25leS10ZWEtcGFydHktcGF0cmlvdHMtZm91bmRhdGlvbi1yZWFjdHMvP21pZD00Mzg1OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=KZoETGJdAceL96ybxFVaeQ) of TPPF President Jenny Beth Martin:

_**“** This is a big win for all those who care about election integrity and want to make sure that future elections are conducted the right way. This is a critical issue for all Americans, regardless of party affiliation. For the American people to accept election results, there has to be confidence in the process. As of right now, there is a lack of confidence in that process and that confidence must be restored. Today’s ruling is an important step in giving us the answers we need to move forward and rebuild trust.”_
|
---
**Are You Interested in Running for Local Office?**
If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021!
[LOCAL OFFICE CANDIDATE SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTUyLTRkN2M0MDI5NmQwNTQ3MTc4Y2E1NWI1MGMxZTRlZTBj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvbG9jYWwtb2ZmaWNlLWNhbmRpZGF0ZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP21pZD00Mzg1OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=4XuwtEywXNrGHR8GExkgfA)
|
---
Over the past month, Israel has endured a barrage of rocket attacks being fired from Gaza.

Hamas, a U.S. State Department designated terrorist group, fired rockets indiscriminately at civilian areas in attempts to overwhelm Israel’s Iron Dome defense system and kill innocent Israelis. Israel responded with tactical precision, taking out Hamas terrorists.

The conflict arose when Palestinian elections were canceled, because Palestinian leader Mahmoud Abbas realized he was going to lose the election. So, in a ploy to distract people and remain in power, he manufactured conflict with Israel, agitating a decades old battle. In an attempt to take support away from Abbas, Hamas joined the conflict launching thousands of rockets at civilian areas.

Meanwhile, in the U.S., far-left anti-Semitic radicals, like Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar, immediately began to blame Israel -- their claims, unsurprisingly, were picked up by the mainstream media. One of the main attacks against Israel was that their tactical response was hitting civilian areas. But what Tlaib, Omar and others failed to mention is that Hamas is known for hiding amongst and launching attacks from within civilian areas, such as schools and hospitals, to try to use the people there as human shields.

A cease-fire agreement was finally reach and thus far holds. But that hasn’t stopped the left-wing radicals and mainstream media from continuing to slander Israel. We see through their bigotry and lies.
|
---

The grassroots approved the upcoming events listed below, and the sooner you get yours planned, the better your events will be! **[Please fill out the form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTUyLTRkN2M0MDI5NmQwNTQ3MTc4Y2E1NWI1MGMxZTRlZTBj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzMxZnBfUk5YQTlaMWtVZDB0LXUyVDNPdndadnRURUd3MDExaU9PUlBiS2hvb0tBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00Mzg1OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=7Htf9iw47aq2SvVR9yI6xw) letting us know whether you will organize or attend these summer events.**

clean_body: | | Yesterday was Memorial Day, the day we stop to honor and remember the Americans who gave their lives to protect and defend our Constitution, our country, and our way of life. Please remember to pray for those who have fallen and for their families. Make sure to tell your children and grandchildren what Memorial Day means and about the heroes in our nation’s history; keep the memories alive, and help instill a love of country in America’s future generation. Action items for this week include: Discussing certain issues with your Members of Congress (in person or calling their offices) Researching your local government entities so you are ready to act Sign-up forms in case you haven’t sign up yet for various activities See below for details! Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Issues to Discuss with Your Senators and Representative – in person or over the phone In person: Members are home this week, and sometimes, particularly around holidays like Memorial Day, they attend community events. If you find yourself at an event with any of your Members, please discuss the following list of issues with them. Phone: If you will not be at any events with your Members, please call your Senators and your Representative and just read through this list over the phone. No new Iran Deal! Iran uses American taxpayer money to attack Israel, and would only use any concessions in a new deal to further their ability to make war against Israel and the U.S. Oppose any new version of the Iran Deal! Biden’s tax plans are insane. He wants to jack up corporate tax rates, and like usual, this is a bad idea for the economy and jobs. But it’s especially bad while America attempts to recover from the government-imposed Covid lockdowns, and while people are getting paid more to sit at home than go to work. Oppose Biden’s tax plans! The infrastructure bill is a backdoor to the Green New Deal. The Democrats know the GND is unpopular, so like they do, they are hiding it in another bill. This will make America even more dependent on China and the Middle East. It’s also interesting that Biden killed the Keystone Pipeline (an American pipeline), but approved a Putin pipeline. Where are all the Russia conspirators now? Oppose the infrastructure bill! | On Memorial Day, we remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in defense of our great nation. Memorial Day weekend is not a long-weekend for relaxation and revelry, it is a time to remember and mourn those that paid the highest price to protect and preserve the liberty we hold dear. Without them, there would be no American holidays, there would be no freedom, and there would be no America. They are the reason we are here, living in the land of the free. And on Memorial Day, we remember them, their service and their sacrifice. We must never forget that we are the land of the free because of the brave. | Get Your Research on Local Government Done This Week July is National Attend a School Board Meeting Month. August is National Attend a City Government Meeting Month. This week is the time to get all your research done about your local government, so that in July and August (and any other time that arises), you are ready to act. Please note that the exact names of the government entities will vary from place to place, i.e. it might be called “county council,” or “county commission,” etc. That’s part of your research – what are your local government entities even called? Compile your research in a spreadsheet or document on your computer, or on paper, whichever you prefer. Just make sure it’s easy to access when you need it. Basic List of Local Government Entities to Research School Board (even if you don’t have kids in the local school district, you pay taxes to support it and have a say) City Council County Council Library Board Board of Elections Basic Questions to Research Who are the members? How many members are there? What is their contact information? Are they appointed or elected? If appointed, who appoints them and when? If elected, when is their next election? Do they represent districts? If so, what are the districts and is there a map you can access? When do they meet? Can you attend a meeting in person or is it online? Where do they meet if it’s in person? If it’s online, how can you register for the online meeting? Do you need to RSVP ahead of time? Can you comment during a meeting? If so, what are the rules about commenting? How much time will you have? Do you have to sign up ahead of time? Right now, do they require masks to attend the meetings? What’s the process for submitting legislation/ordinances/rules to them? Anything else you find that you think would be important to know ahead of time! | “Critical race theory has managed to sneak its way into the U.S. federal government, our nation’s schools and corporate training programs. Americans are beginning to realize the insidious nature of this Marxist ideology that views racism as the primary force at work in our society....” from Jenny Beth Martin on why and how we can stop Critical Race Theory. | Sign up for the Eternal Vigilance Project If you haven’t yet signed up for the Eternal Vigilance Project, please sign up this week! There are two levels available. Keeper of the Republic of has fewer commitments than Champion of the Republic, so pick the level that matches your availability, and while even Keeper might be a challenge, I encourage you to try to meet that challenge. Sign up at the links below. | GREAT NEWS: After we filed an amicus curiae brief in support of the petitioner, a judge in Fulton County, Georgia granted the motion to unseal in the case Favorito v. Cooney. of TPPF President Jenny Beth Martin: “ This is a big win for all those who care about election integrity and want to make sure that future elections are conducted the right way. This is a critical issue for all Americans, regardless of party affiliation. For the American people to accept election results, there has to be confidence in the process. As of right now, there is a lack of confidence in that process and that confidence must be restored. Today’s ruling is an important step in giving us the answers we need to move forward and rebuild trust.” | Are You Interested in Running for Local Office? If you’re interested in running for local office, especially if you’d like to run in the 2022 election, now is the time to let us know because you must get trained in 2021! | Over the past month, Israel has endured a barrage of rocket attacks being fired from Gaza. Hamas, a U.S. State Department designated terrorist group, fired rockets indiscriminately at civilian areas in attempts to overwhelm Israel’s Iron Dome defense system and kill innocent Israelis. Israel responded with tactical precision, taking out Hamas terrorists. The conflict arose when Palestinian elections were canceled, because Palestinian leader Mahmoud Abbas realized he was going to lose the election. So, in a ploy to distract people and remain in power, he manufactured conflict with Israel, agitating a decades old battle. In an attempt to take support away from Abbas, Hamas joined the conflict launching thousands of rockets at civilian areas. Meanwhile, in the U.S., far-left anti-Semitic radicals, like Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar, immediately began to blame Israel -- their claims, unsurprisingly, were picked up by the mainstream media. One of the main attacks against Israel was that their tactical response was hitting civilian areas. But what Tlaib, Omar and others failed to mention is that Hamas is known for hiding amongst and launching attacks from within civilian areas, such as schools and hospitals, to try to use the people there as human shields. A cease-fire agreement was finally reach and thus far holds. But that hasn’t stopped the left-wing radicals and mainstream media from continuing to slander Israel. We see through their bigotry and lies. | Plan Your Summer Events Now The grassroots approved the upcoming events listed below, and the sooner you get yours planned, the better your events will be! letting us know whether you will organize or attend these summer events. | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 | **

Friend -- As we enter the final week of this primary, I'm doing everything I can to make sure we have the resources we need to get out the vote. Over the course of this campaign, we've talked about leading the way on justice reform and policing because this moment in our shared Virginia journey demands it. It's time for an Attorney General who will be proactive - not reactive - and not blow with the political winds. We must lean into the urgency of this historic moment with actions that reflect our commitment to true racial justice, not just words or gamesmanship. [**If you 're with me, can I count on you to chip in to my campaign today so we can get out the vote over this final week of the campaign?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZcB1kl9nAQIvwuzsHAJwU4T1WGGdsKWQHrwSW7-M8W0=/QUfAMmI-rm5vH_4arE0_pDHu9zLcPcfKlkBx47PHl_4=) Governor Ralph Northam, former Attorney General Mary Sue Terry, Congresswoman Elaine Luria, Congressman Bobby Scott, and over 30 of my colleagues in the state legislature have endorsed my candidacy because they believe we have the vision and values to beat Republicans in November and reimagine this old office in a new way. I will rise to meet the demands of this moment and reach for the ceiling, not settle for the floor. **[I hope I can count on you to contribute to our campaign over this final stretch so we have the resources we need to win on June 8 and in November.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZcB1kl9nAQIvwuzsHAJwU4T1WGGdsKWQHrwSW7-M8W0=/QUfAMmI-rm5vH_4arE0_pDHu9zLcPcfKlkBx47PHl_4=)** \- Jay Jones

name: Team Franchot
subject: Our upcoming Weekend of Action
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
We’re very excited to let you know that our first Weekend of Action is right around the corner! From June 5 - 6, Team Franchot will be hosting an important volunteer push in your county -- and we want to make sure that you have a chance to participate!
Will you sign up to join us for our Weekend of Action? Together, we’ll be doing the crucial work of reaching out to voters and spreading the word about Peter’s bold vision for Maryland’s future! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rHJ0UGhtQUKVSETtLBCMBA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/rHJ0UGhtQUKVSETtLBCMBA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rHJ0UGhtQUKVSETtLBCMBA2]We’re building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and grassroots supporters like you are vital to our efforts. From phone banking to door knocking, to elevating our message on social media or making a donation, there are many ways for you to get involved this weekend with our team.
This is our campaign’s first major Weekend of Action, and as the race for Governor begins to heat up, it’s incredibly important that we maintain our momentum. With your help, we can secure a better and stronger future for all of Maryland’s communities in 2022.
Click here to sign up for our Weekend of Action. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/rHJ0UGhtQUKVSETtLBCMBA2]
We look forward to seeing you!
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em060121]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

clean_body: There's just SEVEN days until my primary election and I need your help. = Derek, I can't believe I'm saying this but we are just SEVEN DAYS AWAY from my primary election! This campaign has worked through some truly unprecedented challenges and with just a week to go we're working night and day to reach voters and spread my message of building a bold, progressive future for Virginia. But outside groups are sending in thousands of dollars in baseless attacks on my record, and with just a week to go we need all the help we can get to set the record straight. = | | = | = | = | = Every single dollar will help our team close out this campaign strong. We're building a broad coalition of supporters to stand against the thousands in outside spending, and I'm so glad to have you on this team. Best, Delegate Ibraheem Samirah Dr. Ibraheem Samirah is a bold, progressive who is working tirelessly to create a healthier Virginia by building quality affordable housing, an equitable healthcare system and strengthening the base of our democracy. This team is powered by grassroots donors like you -- not the powerful special interests. So, if you can, chip in today to help us grow this campaign. | = Paid for by Samirah for Delegate Samirah For Delegate PO Box 1503 Herndon, VA 20172 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: A small setback
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
I wish I was starting the month off with better news for you, Peter.

I just got the final update from my finance team regarding our May end-of-month fundraising deadline, **and we just barely missed our $15,000 goal.** Our May fundraising goal was only our second goal since launching this campaign, and missing it now is not a good sign.

But this is a small setback, and it does not define our campaign. If we gave up anytime things got difficult, then we wouldn't have launched this campaign in the first place.

Nothing worth fighting for has ever been easy -- and this Senate race is no exception. You've always been a strong supporter of this campaign and I know that we can get back on track this month.

So our team wants to kick off the month a little differently: **we've extended our end-of-month fundraising goal to midnight on Saturday to raise an additional $8,000 to start the month strong.** This is our chance for a fresh start, and our team is fired up and ready to continue to fight for the kitchen table issues Wisconsinites care about.

[**If you're able, please make a donation of $5 or more before Saturday's extended end-of-month fundraising deadline. Every dollar gets us one step closer to giving Ron Johnson the boot.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30107007/288500257/1978118503?gpsid=31_130_19156&refcode=em21_210601_EOMty_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210601_EOMty_fnd_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDljNmNlMS0wN2MzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4NyJRlvlCMyGAueon3Q_6EPdUkH4DY7de1lyvQP1DJE=)

Onward,

Sarah

name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: I'm Proud to be Gay!
body:
We can make history together!
| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=1)
---
Peter, [**It's PRIDE month! Could you help us celebrate it by donating $10?**](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztt_iBfoM5uf539PqqxHZwYlegaY2Mexqg90xKesyy5dGckizsZiwigzzfG1VykHpY&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=2) It took more than 50 years for same-sex couples to be legally allowed to marry. In 1969 the Stonewall Inn was raided by police in New York; a series of riots occurred after that known today as the Stonewall Riots. The fight for equal rights was already well underway, but these riots marked a prominent point in our history. With the 2010 repeal of Don't Ask Don't Tell and the 2013 Supreme Court ruling to remove a portion of the Defense of Marriage Act, my husband and I got married that year. This year is quite a bit different from the other PRIDE years for me, and that is because I am running to be the first openly gay man in the U.S. Senate. While other Senators have come out after being in office, and we have gay females, we have never had an openly gay man in office. **[Let's make history together, donate $10.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztt_iBfoM5uf539PqqxHZwYlegaY2Mexqg90xKesyy5dGckizsZiwigzzfG1VykHpY&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=3)** We can work to ensure that the LGBTQ+ community is empowered and created equally. We have the power to create a more equitable world and a world where everyone is welcomed and loved. We need someone with Fresh Ideas. That is why I'm running, we can bring fresh ideas to Washington, and we can make history! Together we can do this. **[Donate $10 right now to help kick off PRIDE month, and together we can make history!](It's%20PRIDE%20month!%20Help%20us%20celebrate%20it%20by%20donating%20%2410!%20%20It%20took%20more%20than%2050%20years%20for%20same%20sex%20couples%20to%20be%20legally%20allowed%20to%20marry.%C2%A0%20%20In%201969%20the%20Stonewall%20Inn%20was%20raided%20by%20police%20in%20New%20York,%20a%20series%20of%20riots%20took%20place%20there%20after%20known%20today%20as%20the%20Stonewall%20Riots.%20The%20fight%20for%20equal%20rights%20was%20already%20well%20underway%20but%20these%20riots%20marked%20a%20prominent%20point%20in%20our%20history.%C2%A0%20%20After%20the%202010%20repeal%20of%20Don't%20Ask%20Don't%20Tell%20and%20the%202013%20rulining%20by%20the%20Supreme%20Court%20to%20remove%20a%20portion%20of%20the%20Defense%20of%20Marriage%20Act,%20my%20husband%20and%20I%20got%20married%20that%20year.%C2%A0%20%20This%20year%20is%20quite%20a%20bit%20different%20from%20the%20other%20PRIDE%20years%20for%20me%20and%20that%20is%20because%20I%20am%20running%20to%20be%20the%20first%20openly%20gay%20man%20in%20the%20U.S.%20Senate.%20While%20other%20Senators%20have%20come%20out%20after%20being%20in%20office%20and%20we%20have%20gay%20females,%20we%20have%20never%20had%20an%20openly%20gay%20man%20in%20office.%20%20Let's%20make%20history%20together,%20donate%20%2410%20right%20now%20so%20together%20we%20can%20make%20history!)** Nicolaus for U.S. Senate Campaign Team
[](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=4)[www.Nick4WA.com](https://www.nick4wa.com?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=5) [](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6k0Jm8jDE109S7GZfhKfaXmMV0wRNVYoxdZ8n_Nc9D9t&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=6)
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y3VOJhhOlfNS34J6bd3r1Y4GA2_ravK9BeRX9PGqMLAf&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=7)
[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TszGt6HvVAjUBT4DK-5VAnA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=8) **Our mailing address is:** CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 _Copyright © 2020 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved._
CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER · 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256, Puyallup, WA 98375, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.nick4wa.com/unsubscribe?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=9).
You can also keep up with Nicolaus Sleister on [Twitter](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNC3l6O4KvVEpDWJGhNvZIvg&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=10) or [Facebook](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6pbBvsAFXrfU42KzBC5nXK943wDZFUJVIn4QFt2h26S5&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=11).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pride_21_01&n=12), software for leaders.

name: Karen Bass
subject: Not the news I wanted to share today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Friend,

I just checked in with my team, and it looks like we missed the mark on our end-of-month goal. We hoped to raise $10,000 by last night at midnight, but we fell short.

Hitting our fundraising goals early on is absolutely necessary if we plan to hold on to the Democratic House majority. I'm disappointed we came up short, especially when there is so much on the line.

**We 've extended our fundraising deadline to tonight at midnight to see if folks can chip in to help close the gap. If you're able, will you contribute toward our goal? I've included a personal link for you:**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-may21-eom-extension?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/xrFV3280HcSywG5az9CquoCcIzSJloH6_YQu_0VdgvQ=/2NSBYcecV9bHFT9F8oAjvRqCgs32b72Rty5xGzchTmA=?gpsid=39_132_19157&refcode=em21_210601_extd_fnd_gq_act_eom_KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210601_extd_fnd_gq_act_eom_KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

Thank you for your support,

Karen

name: Mike Collier
subject: Texas Democrats blocked SB7, but the fight’s not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
In case you missed it, folks: **In the legislative session’s final hours, Texas Democrats successfully blocked the final vote for SB7 — one of the strictest bills in the nation designed to suppress the vote, especially amongst voters of color.** __**First**__ : This bill was a number one priority for Dan Patrick. Over the weekend, Patrick suspended the Texas Senate’s rules to pass SB7 after negotiating in secret and expelling reporters from the Senate floor. Though the bill wasn’t yet available to the public and filled with mistakes, the Senate passed it anyway. __**Then**__ : The fight went to the Texas House, where the GOP introduced the bill ahead of the midnight deadline. On Sunday, House Democrats asked pointed questions about why it banned voting on Sunday mornings, targeting "souls to the polls" get-out-the-vote efforts often led by Black churches. They also asked why the bill made it illegal for unrelated people to drive together to vote. Shut out and unable to get answers, the House Democrats took action by walking out of the Capitol to deny the Republicans quorum and effectively stopped SB7 in its tracks. __**But what now?**__ Governor Abbott will soon call a special session of the legislature where Dan Patrick will reintroduce the bill or even worse. And now he’s threatening to defund the salaries of anyone who tries to block the process. SB7 may be dead, but efforts to suppress the vote are not. **As long as Dan Patrick is Lt. Governor, bills like SB7 will persist and will likely pass. The only definitive way to stop them once and for all is to vote Patrick out. Chip in any amount today to help us fight back any attempt to reintroduce SB7 and voter suppression bills:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30110380/288514521/-391059879?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=mc-em210601-sb7-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmE4MGM2ZC0xNGMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9ZeoT2pDWVsOEiGXrNoMtnH7r2Yc7t44cWWV9G2PayY=)

clean_body: | In case you missed it, folks: In the legislative session’s final hours, Texas Democrats successfully blocked the final vote for SB7 — one of the strictest bills in the nation designed to suppress the vote, especially amongst voters of color. First : This bill was a number one priority for Dan Patrick. Over the weekend, Patrick suspended the Texas Senate’s rules to pass SB7 after negotiating in secret and expelling reporters from the Senate floor. Though the bill wasn’t yet available to the public and filled with mistakes, the Senate passed it anyway. Then : The fight went to the Texas House, where the GOP introduced the bill ahead of the midnight deadline. On Sunday, House Democrats asked pointed questions about why it banned voting on Sunday mornings, targeting "souls to the polls" get-out-the-vote efforts often led by Black churches. They also asked why the bill made it illegal for unrelated people to drive together to vote. Shut out and unable to get answers, the House Democrats took action by walking out of the Capitol to deny the Republicans quorum and effectively stopped SB7 in its tracks. But what now? Governor Abbott will soon call a special session of the legislature where Dan Patrick will reintroduce the bill or even worse. And now he’s threatening to defund the salaries of anyone who tries to block the process. SB7 may be dead, but efforts to suppress the vote are not. As long as Dan Patrick is Lt. Governor, bills like SB7 will persist and will likely pass. The only definitive way to stop them once and for all is to vote Patrick out. Chip in any amount today to help us fight back any attempt to reintroduce SB7 and voter suppression bills: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Without Texans like you raising their voices and speaking out, we would not have scored this critical victory to secure and protect our democracy. Thanks for being in this fight with us, — Mike Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

Peter,

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I can’t imagine doing this without you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I wanted to pause for a moment and thank you for your support this past month and for being a part of this team.
We just wrapped up our May fundraising deadline — and my team is still combing over the numbers — but from what we can tell, our results are going to be great.
And that’s important for two reasons: one, because we aren’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money. And two, because a National Republican Super PAC dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking our campaign.
It’s your support that will give us the ability to go up against the special interests who want to defeat us — so thank you, I can’t imagine doing this without you.
The months ahead are going to be critical for building up this team so we can prepare for the tough fights ahead.
But the good news is, there’s still a lot of ways you can be involved. Whether you are donating or sharing our social media posts — every action you take supports this ongoing mission for our shared values. And I want you to know that I’m extremely grateful for everything you do.
I look forward to what’s next knowing that I have you all by my side, it really makes all of the difference.
Full speed ahead,
— Mark
If you are able, please consider making a donation to help fuel our people-powered campaign.
We need to keep up the pace in 2021, and anything you can give will go a long way since we don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money.
We appreciate your support!
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210601-1-15&t=1&refcode2=728_6688874_W3D_k1&akid=728%2E6688874%2EW3D_k1)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

clean_body: Friends — I wanted to pause for a moment and thank you for your support this past month and for being a part of this team. We just wrapped up our May fundraising deadline — and my team is still combing over the numbers — but from what we can tell, our results are going to be great. And that’s important for two reasons: one, because we aren’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money. And two, because a National Republican Super PAC dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking our campaign. It’s your support that will give us the ability to go up against the special interests who want to defeat us — so thank you, I can’t imagine doing this without you. The months ahead are going to be critical for building up this team so we can prepare for the tough fights ahead. But the good news is, there’s still a lot of ways you can be involved. Whether you are donating or sharing our social media posts — every action you take supports this ongoing mission for our shared values. And I want you to know that I’m extremely grateful for everything you do. I look forward to what’s next knowing that I have you all by my side, it really makes all of the difference. Full speed ahead, — Mark If you are able, please consider making a donation to help fuel our people-powered campaign. We need to keep up the pace in 2021, and anything you can give will go a long way since we don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money. We appreciate your support! Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Team Faulconer
subject: Strong Month On The Campaign Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Peter, Kevin continues to set himself apart as the leading candidate to recall Gavin Newsom, building clear momentum by focusing on the issues that matter most to California voters. _SF Gate_ analyzed his strong performance in the month of May and how he has set himself apart from the other candidates in the recall as a "serious" issue-driven candidate who represents the best chance for Republicans to defeat Newsom this year. Read the full _SF Gate_ article **[HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1fc06f6f9e8105a7/efa481f37dcf0d3dc3d6b838967d376c/34943)**. _**HIGHLIGHTS:**_ **On Mayor Faulconer's growing momentum in the recall:** _Meanwhile, former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer — the only other high-profile Republican running in the Gavin Newsom recall election — had a pretty good month by most standards._ _He unveiled a middle class tax cut plan he touted as "the largest middle class tax cut" in the history of California, avoided negative headlines and drew high praise during an appearance on "Ruthless," a popular conservative podcast that regularly features prominent Republican politicians. Jenner pulled a no-show on the podcast a week prior._ _"We need serious people to fight what the left is up to and as soon as we sort of made that statement, we had a whole bunch of people in California reach out to us to say, 'Have you checked out Mayor Kevin Faulconer?'" said podcast co-host Josh Holmes, former chief of staff to Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell. "Because this might be the guy."_ **On how Mayor Faulconer has set himself apart from other candidates _:_** _When compared with Cox and Jenner, Faulconer has been decidedly serious. The mayor's "Ruthless" appearance could help him consolidate support among California Republicans, and Faulconer likes to highlight the fact that San Diego's voter registration statistics (only 25% of registered voters are Republicans, the rest are Democrats or independents) line up with the statewide stats..._ _However, Dr. Isaac Hale, a lecturer in political science at UC Davis, said that if Faulconer — who was elected twice in Democratic San Diego and has a history of bipartisanship — emerges as the likely replacement, it could possibly alter voters' thinking when they vote on the first question of whether to recall Newsom._ **On Mayor Faulconer’s chances of winning the recall:** _...if Faulconer — who was elected twice in Democratic San Diego and has a history of bipartisanship — emerges as the likely replacement, it could possibly alter voters' thinking when they vote on the first question of whether to recall Newsom._ _"Potentially," Hale said when asked if Faulconer's rise could kneecap the Newsom team's talking points that voting "yes" on the recall would give way to a Republican in the mold of Donald Trump, who is highly unpopular in California. "If you're the Newsom campaign, you're really happy right now to see recall support divided among four Republicans, especially when one of them is Faulconer, who styles himself as a moderate and can appeal to independents and Democrats. And the theatrics of Cox and Jenner aid his talking points._ **On the challenges facing Newsom this summer:**

_Earlier this week, the Los Angeles Times published a story highlighting the threat fire/power outage season poses to Newsom's political fortunes._ _"It could be a major issue,” Republican strategist Dave Gilliard told the LA Times. “People will ultimately hold him responsible for the state of California, and if they can’t turn their lights on right around the time they’re voting, they’re going to be thinking about that.”_ -Team Faulconer _**P.S. Help Kevin keep the momentum going by making a grassroots donation! It's critical that we ramp up our efforts and need your help to do so.[DONATE HERE >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1fc06f6f9e8105a7/c2df686639753553c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**_ [**DONATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1fc06f6f9e8105a7/b51e7c53a7ee3ca9c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1fc06f6f9e8105a7/d05d9d74edb6f3bac3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1fc06f6f9e8105a7/817e63fc78b93952c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1fc06f6f9e8105a7/9728344473cdbf24c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1fc06f6f9e8105a7/f0a3d4ba77f21980c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Thank you very much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is a marathon, not a sprint | | |
---
Hello, I wanted to take a minute today to thank you for being a part of my campaign. I know that after the year we’ve had, there are times when campaigns are the last thing you want to think about. But your support matters personally to me, and every step — from reading an email, to giving a few dollars, to telling a friend about our campaign — makes a tremendous difference. A race like this is a marathon, not a sprint, and you’ll be hearing from me a lot more in the coming weeks and months. If there’s one thing that I hope you take to heart, it’s that I am truly grateful for your support that has allowed me to serve the people of New Hampshire and help as many people as I can. I won’t sugarcoat this: this is going to be an uphill battle. But when I see what we’ve accomplished so far, and how folks like you are already getting involved, I know we can win this. Thank you again for all that you do. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan P.S. We just closed the books on our May fundraising, but our major FEC deadline is just around the corner. **[If you could chip in $5 or more today, it would mean a lot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30114508/288528873/1251890980?refcode=e20210601_ty&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmE5MTAyYi0yMmMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O9WcJP6jlwHMYA2BdjCQxquv15-VTB5jrlFmYOK2JLE=)** | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30114509/288528874/1251890980?refcode=e20210601_ty&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmE5MTAyYi0yMmMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O9WcJP6jlwHMYA2BdjCQxquv15-VTB5jrlFmYOK2JLE=)

With the onset of summer and some return to normalcy in American life, it has been difficult to fundraise and draw attention to the stakes of the 2022 midterms. That makes us even more grateful for your generosity and everything you do for Team Moulton. May was one of our best fundraising months of the year and we’re now entering the last month of the second quarter in a stronger position than we expected. Preserving our Democratic majorities in Congress will require all of us working hard and working together—the way we did in 2020 to beat Donald Trump. We’re glad to have you on the team. -Team Moulton = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $2,900 per election; $5,800 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors. Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Doug Ose
subject: California’s population emergency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Ever since our state was founded in 1850, our population has been continuously growing ever since. People came to California for hope and opportunity. Peter, Ever since our state was founded in 1850, our population has been continuously growing ever since. People came to California for hope and opportunity. We never saw a year where our population dipped. **_Until now._** People are now fleeing California. For the first time in 171 years, our population dropped while states like Texas and Florida saw a population surge. This is due to years and years of failed Democratic leadership, especially Gavin Newsom. He’s caused thousands to leave the state in search for somewhere they can freely run their business or send their kids to school. Businesses no longer want to be in this state. The state birth rate has been in decline for years. The state of prosperity has become the state where business and families flee from. [**Peter, I need your help to fix this. It’s time to get Gavin Newsom OUT of leadership and bring IN leadership that represents YOU.** **Can you chip in name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: final one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
Tonight is the final debate before the primary, which is exactly one week from today. Tonight is the final moment to show voters this is a time that calls for something new. The status quo isn’t what Virginians deserve or need at this moment.

We are exactly **ONE WEEK** out from the primary and my team is working around the clock to connect with voters statewide. Polling shows that we have momentum and when voters hear about my vision, they support it.

**This means every dollar in the door right now could make the difference between winning and losing because each dollar allows us to expand our outreach in this critical time.**

**[I’m asking you to chip in before I take the stage tonight for the final debate. Can I count on you?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXD-m8piNgU1Gi8bNlAUiDgSQ-WmD2GQ2usAx9BMJsjNPi05JZgLfTq7AmOq0qbitGzXqoHtwgMOW28qBciZP18PiuYqeutVOSclRLKc8cxVkiX3htjG_Fx7pAZ6eSgZAJ9JwqleCmOleJnH2x2wLniT8ke3yG4Jek4SRrrjhd71mX4YqQlLqXh4qOyxktaHuR0HeGbEbof6DkzYBNxNO4LdAT25mk-YfTU0MsINTvV5tASWtdzTW50pv2B3Hjrx9YpOgh3gKW5JIWAy2CGDkdIRyK4ryB5VmAiGM-VWhRjrfU/3ce/sODTBJp1Qr2eZRNi_IHu-A/h0/PafuIjZLQuPILW_dkvk_XCnkrA4Gl66AjYy2R1_0D2Y)**

Thank you for standing by me,

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MK-_k-NMJrZmpSuvxWsLh1bfhYq1CzXCUQ1AqCC2xGaIlA1ck8o2pqhY8V6-eK-kXoinmN9Wnx6ovh2PtBodP9yXAS2jgUz4b02wnu1tih1mrQ5fqmkLRJzbLOU8n0FdvMTrLEAMTlnhmvntDLoTdsD-cpFxsRC3bA8DWnFRm_Z754ISERp0MZX0Q7ZEIJVHYw/3ce/sODTBJp1Qr2eZRNi_IHu-A/h2/7CR0VwM3MkZs-9mi7UVv8XqVIAxRRKNXQU5A8CWPL4k)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa5vOfMIiSAYEKf1-kvtaIPC_7O57UX0BynolRB282XD9yJlox0zmXEE1GP9CTVFclvQoqJvEUTCLCpgA7G6VOA8A6QaRiSStcMDSqsaVu_EWX-Jl9YKT0p0QQJdYl865-CXWMuVblDuE-BT54JBjE8UA-xpBrNJJxaL_60dB86YO7DDbGkeylvjC8WGxxNyzHg/3ce/sODTBJp1Qr2eZRNi_IHu-A/h3/FCNg7nk9LrynFIJbSAjU0E_gnQjdqwuOj090cI4ALrY) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

clean_body: | | | Tonight is the final debate before the primary, which is exactly one week from today. Tonight is the final moment to show voters this is a time that calls for something new. The status quo isn’t what Virginians deserve or need at this moment. We are exactly ONE WEEK out from the primary and my team is working around the clock to connect with voters statewide. Polling shows that we have momentum and when voters hear about my vision, they support it. This means every dollar in the door right now could make the difference between winning and losing because each dollar allows us to expand our outreach in this critical time. Thank you for standing by me, Jennifer Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities. She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor. Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. ** | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via . name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: You're Invited: 2021 Golden Tennis Shoe Awards
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

You're invited, Peter:
**It 's almost time for my favorite event of the year -- the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards! And this year's special guest is my friend and colleague Senator Tim Kaine.**
I'm so excited to honor some of Washington state's local heroes who have stepped up and made a difference in their communities this past year at our virtual event. Every year, this event is the chance to lift up those around us who are doing amazing work and this year is no exception.
[**Want to join the celebration on June 16? Get the details -- and get your tickets now!**](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6930ee/22080b68/797d0bd0/46022ef1/299662973/VEsH/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3568017976684711168?refcode=em210601_638")
The past year and a half has been a trying time for all of us, but there have certainly been some bright spots -- and I hope you can join us for our virtual ceremony celebrating the individuals who have worked so hard to help their neighbors and make our communities better places.
And with a laser-thin majority in the Senate, Senator Kaine will join me to talk more about the urgent fight to defend our Democratic Senate majority.
[**Peter, will I see you at the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards? RSVP now!**](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6930ee/22080b68/797d0bd0/46022ef1/299662973/VEsE/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3568017976684711168?refcode=em210601_638")
Thank you,
Patty

_ _
****[RSVP](https://act.pattymurray.%3D%3D/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://act.myngp.com/Forms/3568017976684711168?refcode=em210601_638&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
_** **_

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6930ee/22080b68/797d0bd0/46022ef7/299662973/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6930ee/22080b68/797d0bd0/46022ef6/299662973/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

subject: Defeat the 35 RINOs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
I want them gone! |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9eb3a119db&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots changing Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=354781a53f&e=ba6e67b849)!

**One of the biggest travesties of a very bad Congress is the vote for political persecution of America First patriots - the "Truth Commission". **

Whenever the Soviets had a "truth commission", it was always a pretext to settle scores against political enemies and COVER UP THE TRUTH, not investigate it.

Nancy Pelosi held the vote last week on creating a "Commission" to investigate the January 6 events at the Capitol. Every Democrat voted for it, proving that there are no "moderate Democrats".

What was enraging was that 35 RINOs joined her.

The text of the bill shows the intent! It starts out with a judgement, calling January 6 a __**‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’.**__

Well, if they are starting off by calling it that, there is no need to investigate, is there? They already came to a conclusion- _and that conclusion was the most lopsided farce they could think of._

Make no mistake, they want to pin all America First patriots as "domestic terrorists". They just needed to give themselves a fig leaf.

Here's what I say: it wasn't an insurrection. You can't have an insurrection by people who were not armed. You can't have an insurrection when the Constitution guarantees the "right of assembly for the redress of grievances".

_Then again, some RINOs never cared about the Constitution. For them, like Paul Ryan and John Boehner, it was always about "Orange Man Bad", and trying to attack President Trump's supporters._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1243efcdf4&e=ba6e67b849)
---

Anthony Gonzalez of Ohio

They think you'll never notice. They think you'll never remember their bad votes. So it's up to us to SHOW them that we noticed!

**_If we don't make an example of them, they will never get it_ \- and they will keep on betraying their voters and their country. We have to make them feel the pain, politically.**

[**And I asked you to join them by chipping in a few bucks.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=eb19a53169ee49f29964736dbeba8dcf&_e=8376YOgSvT1FG_w-cpEiWt24YgDfeFbkUBRL2SZjLhxKY0-L8M_3L5b-mXKh0CTw2c5R0yIv-cxiXz8vA20D8-ioxBHoN7E1Y6_F_SMTUu9L5-vR34vStY05_byRX5p-EurjDzq1D_zBHPt7DqeTGW8PUBD8SwHbc7wF4hABAvUwygUbtzMPL2ra5sHQTVX7ZElWAsJufEFEHY85rJKEZGL6ZG4YqHiy0mRHiIZolepeXnzUzktG1g9hXoYXwWcC5Ho6t9G_nEzwocdq4Dsvdz7kTktZ5Kg9REUyL06ilzEnMt5vJlc73pv-AlBQIIlu2aHSZWaQPumXes_T4zIEis7qwYNGPdSMoYD7vHxaLP67RNxtgykar5c1SxSFp-dFWvrA-DfFHQoL_b6tmk800F_BF6EfCIj0f7ctQaH0MaOrabP1a_o2pKQbFmpZq5CFVT-1ahj5SPUgzTYt_-8RnQ%3D%3D) I wanted to follow up with you to share a few more words from State Senator Rick Kloos: [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=eb19a53169ee49f29964736dbeba8dcf&_e=8376YOgSvT1FG_w-cpEiWt24YgDfeFbkUBRL2SZjLhxKY0-L8M_3L5b-mXKh0CTw2c5R0yIv-cxiXz8vA20D8-ioxBHoN7E1Y6_F_SMTUu9L5-vR34vStY05_byRX5p-EurjDzq1D_zBHPt7DqeTGW8PUBD8SwHbc7wF4hABAvUwygUbtzMPL2ra5sHQTVX7ZElWAsJufEFEHY85rJKEZMKnM5hsVoD4JyoOKgFj-0LiQ7jZ2mbVbXiX0nVTH78g-Ep2-RtJwxdOdNUs9zlL2IJgnS1XIsF7RajHxci0f7NPS-IEmKAVwtCxb1PpIitl6kylL5otxYbthotpUleilItpqANhTs0TA1SO5G_14woHGVVzS-8v0IaFGTFp0C7YgDY0NFIp-8oOEQwfp3AOu58iEIN4eQXYQedizkeG_3iKf52RyAi0LJ7bbj_56u6Uzgbji2ZkeCjIhMMhcm5cvg%3D%3D) Friend, I’m very grateful that even this early into our race, conservative leaders from around the state are lining up to join our campaign... But I have a very quick question for YOU: [**Are you with them?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=eb19a53169ee49f29964736dbeba8dcf&_e=8376YOgSvT1FG_w-cpEiWt24YgDfeFbkUBRL2SZjLhxKY0-L8M_3L5b-mXKh0CTw2c5R0yIv-cxiXz8vA20D8-ioxBHoN7E1Y6_F_SMTUu9L5-vR34vStY05_byRX5p-EurjDzq1D_zBHPt7DqeTGW8PUBD8SwHbc7wF4hABAvUwygUbtzMPL2ra5sHQTVX7ZElWAsJufEFEHY85rJKEZBgpfPMEQNRFrm88FO2rcYnEmOOG36uoOAw7x2IMg4ej3j0thE4SpQGNLRS2le__ilrp3v1GAKUYRarUch6rHe5N-zZgBLFk2ze-pdoMDictJnaY1ABHivypgIIVK4QNBMBsa5HWk8HN1hitU63M18cgh3A0gYUJ2q0mU_Z3H77VnE-QbSOZboSDNKlFE47FdGZ4i6288D3xjYUL-ZnCmm94C7f12L_amz7aDz7THGc3XdHVIvvmzHEVK5ENk1ycKA%3D%3D) **[If your answer is ‘YES,’ you can quickly show your support by chipping in $10 now.](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=eb19a53169ee49f29964736dbeba8dcf&_e=8376YOgSvT1FG_w-cpEiWt24YgDfeFbkUBRL2SZjLhxKY0-L8M_3L5b-mXKh0CTw2c5R0yIv-cxiXz8vA20D85olYcCXV2vxvi4eZ_Hy29IFMonL4mtFx1VuPl2nFEtAboN7wGn8DgUJd7ENBTw0hsuiXRL7kImfobFky58AU5RToZTx03j_1rBPETQ3zKjyQyv5GpYU5nkWeKq9PPj7rp2Vy1Mo3F6hqCdt74Un2O-08OPMlthQXJdkNfbxgrcjD1DEnHtjJIk34qZ1-FMqcLOXqC61JS4R2LdgZECx7O7EMYTMuRzrb9I9ZqJeq5MB-Dy2mG69g1N9OWdxQLu2SvE3lJ3FldzeoA6XyhYH737TqgKDPlRSv5xXb9j_ISLuNycvpLouHpl9Ze-6COJKhkZ9X9ZvSdjWocDJcHGY3KPz7IKaJRQnx4Ha-xLApFZrsBdI5MguxIuo28vCUDHLww%3D%3D)** I remain committed to creating a better tomorrow for our Kansas families. Kansans need an advocate in Topeka who works with your values in mind, not dark-money or outrageous policies that appease national groups. As your attorney general, I have stopped scam artists and abusers from preying on seniors, prosecuted crimes against children, and backed the honorable men and women in law enforcement. **[Friend, I need you on my team. subject: It would be a shame

body:
**__**
Don't let Nancy Pelosi expand her Liberal House Majority

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: I'm the biggest threat to the Left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The Leftist media knows their enemy |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=62d332e9b6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear , The Leftist Media is coming after me because they know I am the single biggest danger to their election-stealing operation.

**My name is Mark Finchem and I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative. I am the voice of a powerful grassroots movement that has united Conservatives far and wide in a common cause: To stop the Democrats from stealing America from Conservatives.**

_Every day we are making history in America’s Audit, where we are counting every ballot in Maricopa County to uncover every wrongdoing and misdealing by the Radical Left in the 2020 election._

**And the evidence we are finding is staggering... Between deleted data files, forgotten passwords, and miscounted ballots its no wonder that President Trump lost!**

And we plan on identifying all fraud and fighting against it in court with everything that we have.

**And what’s next?**

** -Michigan**
** -Pennsylvania**
** -Georgia
****-Wisconsin**

And this is just the beginning! Conservatives cannot feel safe in office until the electoral system is safe and secure, and this is why I am proud to be running for Secretary of State of Arizona!

**If I can do all of this as a proud Conservative in a grassroots movement and as a Representative in the Arizona House, then imagine what I can do as Secretary of State where I will oversee our state’s elections!**

The Left sees this coming and is TERRIFIED.

_This is why I am being attacked on all sides, now in a HIT PIECE by Politico!_

[_Donate TODAY to make sure that America’s voice is heard and join our grassroots movement to save our elections and elect me to Secretary of State!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=41c303078e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3692ddbeed&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Do you know why it is so critical that I am elected Secretary of State?_

**_Because it is not only Democrats we are fighting against, but RINOs who are afraid to stand up for election integrity._**

Just recently, Politico reports, Stephen Richer, the RINO who was recently elected to be Maricopa County’s chief elections officer, lashed out at me, saying:

_“Mark Finchem is running for secretary of state. Process that, if the election was completely fraudulent, as he says, why would you run for secretary of state? What, do you think Dominion is going to rig it in your favor this time?”_

_“Why are you running if you do not believe in these elections? I would suggest that his actions speak a lot louder than his words.”_

You’re damn right, RINO Steven. My actions do speak stronger than my words and my words are strong as hell.

**I WILL stand up for election integrity but I don’t just talk the talk, I walk the walk.**

**_Every day I wake up fighting for our elections and every night I go to sleep with RINOs and Democrats pounding on my door begging me not to shake up the establishment._**

What would he prefer that I do? Lay down and not fight for our elections?

**Hell no. I will fight for our elections in 2021 as I have in 2020 and in 2022 as I have in 2021. This isn’t a thrill ride for me.**

**_This is my love for my country and the sanctity of our elections!_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=88052a8c7a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_In this screenshot from the Politico article, they are identifying me, Mark Finchem, as the key driver of the audit of the results in Maricopa County._**

The leftist media is attacking me and singling me out for carrying the torch.

**Politico is again attacking me for being a vocal advocate for election integrity. Why are they attacking me in particular?**

**_They identify me as one of four key nationwide players pushing back against election fraud._**

Liberals and RINOs alike have me on their political hit list and LEFTIST FAKE NEWS MEDIA blasts me on a regular basis.

**What more proof is there that I am THE enemy of the left, the one they are afraid of?**

[_Donate TODAY to fight for election integrity today and tomorrow, in 2021 and in 2022, from now and for our grandchildren!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=751fe4d31b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| My name is Mark Finchem. Being attacked on all sides is not new to me.

**It happened to President Trump and it happened to every Republican who fought against the swamp.**

**_You know what I say? Bring it on. The more you attack me the less you can perpetuate voter fraud and the less you can silence proud Americans._**

I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative.

**Place your trust in the man who has been fighting for Election Integrity from the start.**
---
| [Donate TODAY! Let's stop election fraud together!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=590d79f274&e=44b8c466b0)

Thank you for your support!

God Save the Republic,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8fdea381fe&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Fighter

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

ALERT: Antifa vandals went after my home this weekend. This is UNACCEPTABLE. Join me to send a message that this aggressiveness will not be tolerated: Friend, The radical left just won't stop. From cancel culture, to violence in the streets, they're out to get anyone who dares to disagree with them. Apparently, this week, I'm the target of their rage. In the early morning hours of Memorial Day, my home, where I’m raising my two children, was vandalized with Antifa symbols and profanity. Can you even believe this, friend?? This is absolutely unacceptable - no matter your politics. And I'm not putting up with it! We've got to put an end to the "us" vs "them" mentality that continues to breed violence and hate in our nation. Friend, believe it or not, this is NOT the first time my family has had to deal with this vandalism. The violent left is out of control. They shot Steve Scalise. They put Rand Paul in the hospital and now he’s missing part of his lung. They loot and burn and destroy. They destroy property now including mine - for the second time in just the last few months! I’m concerned for my children and my neighbors who’ve been impacted by this appalling criminal behavior. Let's just be clear - because I think Antifa might not know this: there is a significant difference between nonviolent protests and criminal acts of intimidation and vandalism. Americans should be able to disagree without suffering property damage by the hands of the woke mob. If you agree, will you chip in today to help me defend against this nonsense violence?
